news.title:
Jefferies rates Sai Life Sciences 'Buy' with a Rs 1,300 target due to limited Middle East impact, cost pass-through, and strong project wins.
Sai Life Sciences expects 15-20% sales CAGR, 28-30% EBITDA margins, no destocking, and late-stage pipeline visibility boosting outlook.
news.summary:
Jefferies rates Sai Life Sciences 'Buy' with a Rs 1,300 target due to limited Middle East impact, cost pass-through, and strong project wins.
Sai Life Sciences expects 15-20% sales CAGR, 28-30% EBITDA margins, no destocking, and late-stage pipeline visibility boosting outlook.

news.title:
Sai Life Sciences appoints Dr. John Pavey as Senior Management Personnel, replacing Dr. Dean David Edney from April 1, 2026.
Dr. Pavey brings 20+ years of global experience in CMC, API development, and regulatory approvals with top firms like AstraZeneca.
news.summary:
Sai Life Sciences appoints Dr. John Pavey as Senior Management Personnel, replacing Dr. Dean David Edney from April 1, 2026.
Dr. Pavey brings 20+ years of global experience in CMC, API development, and regulatory approvals with top firms like AstraZeneca.

news.title: Morgan Stanley Asia Singapore Pte bought 796,916 shares of Sai Life Sciences at ₹1015.4.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley Asia Singapore Pte bought 796,916 shares of Sai Life Sciences at ₹1015.4.

news.title:
Sai Life Sciences faces INR 2.54 cr tax demand, INR 1.99 cr interest for FY21.
The company plans to appeal and expects no material financial impact.
news.summary:
Sai Life Sciences faces INR 2.54 cr tax demand, INR 1.99 cr interest for FY21.
The company plans to appeal and expects no material financial impact.

news.title:
Indian CDMOs, including SAI Life Sciences and Akums Drugs, expand capacity as demand for complex drug development rises.
Global pharma firms increasingly outsource complex drug work, driving tech investments in Indian CDMOs.
news.summary:
Indian CDMOs, including SAI Life Sciences and Akums Drugs, expand capacity as demand for complex drug development rises.
Global pharma firms increasingly outsource complex drug work, driving tech investments in Indian CDMOs.

news.title:
Sai Life Sciences reported Q3 FY26 revenue of INR 5.6bn, up 27% y/y, driven by 31% CDMO and 19% CRO growth.
Stock surged 44.4% in 12 months; consensus targets imply up to 32.3% upside from current price, trading at P/E of 49.9x FY27.
news.summary:
Sai Life Sciences reported Q3 FY26 revenue of INR 5.6bn, up 27% y/y, driven by 31% CDMO and 19% CRO growth.
Stock surged 44.4% in 12 months; consensus targets imply up to 32.3% upside from current price, trading at P/E of 49.9x FY27.

news.title:
ICRA assigned Sai Life Sciences long-term rating of ICRA AA (Stable).
The company received ICRA A1 for short-term rating, totaling Rs. 768.6 crore.
news.summary:
ICRA assigned Sai Life Sciences long-term rating of ICRA AA (Stable).
The company received ICRA A1 for short-term rating, totaling Rs. 768.6 crore.

news.title:
Sai Life Sciences shared Q3 9M FY26 earnings call transcript from 6 Feb 2026.
Transcript details unaudited financial results for quarter ending 31 Dec 2025.
news.summary:

news.title:

news.title:
Sai Life Sciences' Q3 PAT nearly doubles YoY, boosting stock performance.
Growth outlook strong with focus on capex and peptide expansion.
news.summary:
Sai Life Sciences' Q3 PAT nearly doubles YoY, boosting stock performance.

news.title:
Sai Life Sciences' Board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations stood at Rs. 5,491.8M, with profit after tax at Rs. 976.3M for Q3 FY25.
news.summary:
Sai Life Sciences' Board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Revenue from operations stood at Rs. 5,491.8M, with profit after tax at Rs. 976.3M for Q3 FY25.

news.title:
Sai Life Sciences partners with Mabtech to enhance immunology research via advanced assay services.
The firm opened a Boston lab as the US hub for its Eyra platform.
news.summary:
Sai Life Sciences partners with Mabtech to enhance immunology research via advanced assay services.

news.title:
HDFC Securities initiates coverage on Divi's Labs, Sai Life, Piramal Pharma, Anthem Bio, and Laurus Labs.
India's CRDMO market is poised to outpace APAC, with strong long-term growth in pharma sector.
news.summary:

The milestone reflects strong performance in the Pharmaceuticals sector.
